metrics_glossary.resolved_count_per_category_max: max resolved across any single heuristic category
metrics_glossary.resolved_count_per_wallet_max: max resolved across any qualified smart-money wallet

items.title: Trade Reconciliation
items.action: Reconcile paper signals against actual Kalshi fills to confirm each signal has a corresponding real trade.
items.notes: Must be completed before position-reconciliation-job can safely automate the same check.

items.title: Real Fill Deduplication
items.action: Audit real_fill rows in leviathan.db and remove duplicate fills that do not match actual positions held.
items.notes: Duplicate fills skew PnL tracking and inflate fill counts used by downstream gates.

items.title: Sample Size Gates
items.action: Document the minimum resolved-signal thresholds that gate each downstream analysis step.
items.notes: Prevents drawing statistical conclusions before sample sizes support reliable estimates.

items.title: Wilson Confidence Intervals
items.action: Add Wilson score confidence intervals to win-rate stats in the email report.
items.notes: Point estimates are misleading at small sample sizes and Wilson intervals are well-calibrated.

items.title: Title Scraping Fix
items.action: Fix market title capture so titles are populated correctly for all logged signal rows.
items.notes: Blank titles break Power BI filtering and make signals unidentifiable in the dashboard.

items.title: Smart Money Drift Alerts
items.action: Alert when a tracked wallet materially shifts position size or direction between daily scans.
items.notes: Direction reversals by high-volume wallets are the strongest signal of new market information.

items.title: Backtest Harness
items.action: Build a framework to replay historical signals against resolved market outcomes.
items.notes: Required foundation before walk-forward-validation can be attempted.

items.title: Position Reconciliation Job
items.action: Automate daily reconciliation of open paper signals against the Kalshi position API.
items.notes: Depends on trade-reconciliation being clean first so automation does not propagate existing errors.

items.title: Brier Score Tracking
items.action: Track Brier scores over time to measure forecast calibration quality across runs.
items.notes: 25 resolved signals gives a stable enough baseline to detect systematic miscalibration.

items.title: Confluence Detection
items.action: Flag and track signals where multiple independent sources agree on direction.
items.notes: Multi-source agreement historically lifts win rates and needs resolved data to measure the effect.

items.title: Edge Decay Analysis
items.action: Measure how quickly identified edges decay as markets approach their resolution date.
items.notes: 30 resolved signals needed to fit a decay curve with acceptable variance.

items.title: Per-Wallet Track Record
items.action: Build per-wallet win rate and PnL tables using resolved signals aligned to wallet positions.
items.notes: 10 resolved signals per wallet is the minimum for a meaningful individual track record.

items.title: Skill vs Luck Weighting
items.action: Apply a binomial skill test to wallet track records to separate genuine skill from luck.
items.notes: Requires the same per-wallet sample size as per-wallet-track-record before the test has power.

items.title: Walk-Forward Validation
items.action: Run rolling out-of-sample validation on the scoring model using the backtest harness.
items.notes: Requires backtest-harness to exist before rolling windows can be executed.

items.title: Slippage Tracking
items.action: Track the difference between signal entry price and actual fill price across all real fills.
items.notes: 20 fills gives a stable estimate of average slippage for bid-ask spread modeling.

items.title: Calibration Curve
items.action: Plot predicted probabilities against actual win rates in decile buckets.
items.notes: 50 resolved signals needed to populate all decile buckets with meaningful counts.

items.title: Calibration Curve Dashboard
items.action: Add the calibration curve chart to the Power BI dashboard.
items.notes: Depends on calibration-curve analysis being complete before the visual can be built.

items.title: Per-Heuristic Scorecard
items.action: Build a per-heuristic win rate and PnL scorecard broken down by flag_path category.
items.notes: 15 resolved signals per category is the minimum for reliable category-level comparisons.

items.title: Heuristic Sunsetting
items.action: Disable or reweight heuristics that consistently underperform relative to base rates.
items.notes: Requires per-category sample size before sunsetting decisions are statistically reliable.

items.title: Empirical Base Rates from Polymarket
items.action: Replace heuristic base rates with empirical rates derived from Polymarket historical outcomes.
items.notes: Empirical rates reduce dependence on subjective prior calibration and should improve edge estimates.

items.title: Auto-Calibration Loop
items.action: Automatically adjust heuristic confidence weights based on tracked Brier scores and category win rates.
items.notes: Requires both sufficient global and per-category sample sizes before automation is safe.

items.title: Smart money wallet tracking page
items.action: Add a Power BI page showing realized hit rate over time per qualified smart-money wallet
items.notes: Viz layer on top of the per-wallet metric, gated so it only surfaces once wallets have enough resolved cross-refs to be readable

items.title: High-price filter (market_price >= 0.85)
items.action: Filter out markets at or above 0.85 market price before writing to DB

items.title: EV per contract display in signals and top picks
items.action: Show EV/contract in signal blocks and top picks summary

items.title: Betting queue block in daily report
items.action: Show top 5 unplaced signals sorted by urgency in daily report
